# UC-12.1.23 · GitLab Merge Request Pipeline Success Rate Drop

## Description

Sudden drops in MR pipeline pass rate often precede flaky tests, runner issues, or policy changes.

## Value

Gives engineering leads an early signal when merge quality regresses before default-branch protections fail.

## Implementation

Ingest MR pipeline payloads; tune minimum daily volume. Compare 1d success rate to prior day; alert on >10pt drop.

## SPL

```spl
index=devops sourcetype="gitlab:pipeline" object_kind=merge_request_event OR source=merge_request
| bin _time span=1d
| eval ok=if(status="success",1,0)
| stats sum(ok) as ok count as total by project_path, _time
| eval success_pct=round(100*ok/total,1)
| where total>=20 AND success_pct < 85
| sort 0 project_path _time
| streamstats current=f last(success_pct) as prev_pct by project_path
| where isnotnull(prev_pct) AND success_pct < prev_pct - 10
```

## Visualization

Line chart (success_pct by project), Single value (worst project).

## References

- [GitLab Add-on for Splunk](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/6848)
